Algorithm Methodology

Uses Weighted K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN). 5 core factors are standardized into positional Z-Scores. The engine computes N-dimensional Euclidean distance to all historical prospects.

Interaction Guide

Heatmaps: Green/Red numbers show raw delta vs the prospect.

Spider Graphs: Click any row to open a head-to-head trait radar chart.
